feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You Found Me First
entry.summary:
Author: Madieeee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,438Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Gotham is the kind of city that teaches you to keep your head down and your mouth shut. You learned that early. Work your shifts, patch up the worst of what the city throws at you, and go home without looking too closely at the darkness between streetlights. It works. Mostly. Until one night it doesn’t. Until a wrong turn on the walk home leads to three men who do not care that you are exhausted, or that you have already spent seventy two hours saving lives. Until you realize no one is coming. Except someone does. Red Hood is not what you expect. He is violent, efficient, and terrifying. But he also stays after. Makes sure you are okay. Walks you home like it is the most normal thing in the world. And then he keeps coming back. You tell yourself it is coincidence. Gotham does not do coincidences. Somewhere between late night visits, stitched wounds, and quiet conversations you were not supposed to have, Jason Todd starts to feel less like a stranger and more like something you cannot ignore. He does not know how to be saved. But he keeps choosing to stay anyway.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Jason Todd/Reader
  • Jason Todd
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Fluff and Angst

entry.title: The Bed's Been Made
entry.summary:
Author: champagnesbiggestproblem

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,719Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: When someone tries breaking into your apartment in the middle of the night, you call your brother to send one of his friends for help. What you don’t expect is to slowly fall for the vigilante who came to your aid.

entry.title: Vials
entry.summary:
Author: mysecretobsession13

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,227Chapters: 3/15Kudos: 6

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 118,389Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 721

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,974Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 24

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,357Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

entry.title: Of Things Red and Undead
entry.summary:
Author: Bat_brat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 153,611Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 1,223

Summary: After his time as the Arkham Knight and the events that followed, Jason Todd is on a journey for redemption. He was trying, anyway, until you came along. You’re no stranger to the shadows that lurk in Gotham’s undertow, but one fateful night, everything is turned upside down and suddenly nothing, nowhere, and no one is safe. Gotham is used to this though right? How much trouble could you possibly be? Especially when a vigilante with anger issues, trauma, and a plethora of guns makes it his personal mission to find out exactly what you are.

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,708Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: Why can't you see me?
entry.summary:
Author: melliezz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,060Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 12

Summary: This is a DC series about batsis reader, who doesn't feel like she fits in, she's always feelt unwanted and like she doesn't belong, even in her own family, making her put all her time into school and over working herself. This had resulted in som deep scars that are getting harder to get rid off. What if this feeling takes over her life completely? What if she managed to get friends that she so badly wants to keep that she's willing to go so far to make her happy? Beware of the tags! This will go for the darker fanfics.

entry.title: And the world kept spinning (but you are my world)
entry.summary:
Author: Arbolitodenamu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,433Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: You move to Gotham thanks to the Wayne Scholarship for the GU. You're staying with a sweet old lady who seems to be very aware of the danger of the crime alley and who loves to share her pastries with her neighbor Jason. Or a fanfiction where you move to Gotham for college and all your deepest thoughts starts getting over your mind while your old friendships stars to fade away one more time. You only seem to find some calm with you new neighbor and you're scared to ruin it all.

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,136Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him.
